data.title: Avanta Level 1
data.description: Level 1 is designed to build the foundational understanding of pacemaker systems, basic cardiac rhythm concepts, device components, indications, and introductory procedural knowledge. This level focuses on structured micro-learning modules that help trainees develop core competency before progressing to advanced device programming, troubleshooting, and clinical application levels.
